name: Bitget Wallet
description: Multi-chain wallet integration for asset management and on-chain interactions via Bitget.
descriptionZh: Bitget 多鏈錢包整合，管理資產、執行鏈上操作。

name: Coinbase
description: Access Coinbase exchange data, manage portfolios, and execute trades through AI.
descriptionZh: 存取 Coinbase 交易所數據，管理投資組合，AI 驅動交易。

name: Binance
description: Connect to Binance for market data, trading, and account management via MCP.
descriptionZh: 連接幣安，取得市場數據、執行交易、管理帳戶。

name: HTX
description: HTX exchange integration for trading operations and market intelligence.
descriptionZh: HTX 交易所整合，支援交易操作與市場情報查詢。

name: OKX
description: OKX exchange connector for real-time data, order management, and analytics.
descriptionZh: OKX 交易所連接器，即時數據、訂單管理與分析。

name: BlockBeats
description: Real-time crypto news feed from BlockBeats — breaking news, flash alerts, and market updates.
descriptionZh: 律動即時新聞流，快訊、市場動態一手掌握。

name: 6551 News Feed
description: Aggregated crypto news from the 6551 network — curated alpha and market signals.
descriptionZh: 6551 聚合新聞源，精選 Alpha 與市場信號。

name: CoinMarketCap
description: Pull live prices, market cap rankings, token info, and trending data from CoinMarketCap.
descriptionZh: 即時價格、市值排名、代幣資訊、熱門趨勢，資料來自 CoinMarketCap。

name: XClaw
description: Monitor X (Twitter) for crypto-related discussions, KOL posts, and sentiment signals.
descriptionZh: 監控 X（Twitter）上的 Crypto 討論、KOL 發文與市場情緒。

name: Almanak
description: DeFi strategy simulation and risk analysis — backtest yield strategies before deploying capital.
descriptionZh: DeFi 策略模擬與風險分析，部署資金前先回測收益策略。

name: Bankr
description: On-chain banking toolkit — manage DeFi positions, track yields, and optimize allocations.
descriptionZh: 鏈上銀行工具包，管理 DeFi 倉位、追蹤收益、優化配置。

name: BNB Chain MCP
description: Native MCP integration for BNB Chain — interact with BSC contracts, tokens, and DApps.
descriptionZh: BNB Chain 原生 MCP 整合，操作 BSC 合約、代幣與 DApp。

name: BNB Chain
description: Query BNB Chain data — balances, transactions, token transfers, and network stats.
descriptionZh: 查詢 BNB Chain 數據 — 餘額、交易、代幣轉帳、網路狀態。

name: Byreal CLI
description: CLI tool for on-chain operations — deploy contracts, send transactions, and manage wallets.
descriptionZh: 鏈上操作 CLI 工具，部署合約、發送交易、管理錢包。

name: Four Meme
description: Track and analyze meme token launches, trends, and trading activity on-chain.
descriptionZh: 追蹤分析 Meme 代幣發行、趨勢與鏈上交易活動。

name: Lista DAO
description: Interact with Lista DAO — liquid staking, borrowing, and yield optimization on BNB Chain.
descriptionZh: 操作 Lista DAO — 流動性質押、借貸、BNB Chain 上的收益優化。

name: Minara AI v2
description: AI-powered on-chain analysis — smart money tracking, whale alerts, and pattern detection.
descriptionZh: AI 驅動的鏈上分析，Smart Money 追蹤、鯨魚警報、模式偵測。

name: Phantom Connect
description: Connect to Phantom wallet for Solana interactions — token swaps, NFTs, and DeFi operations.
descriptionZh: 連接 Phantom 錢包，Solana 上的代幣交換、NFT 與 DeFi 操作。

name: Uniswap AI
description: AI-enhanced Uniswap interface — optimal routing, liquidity analysis, and swap execution.
descriptionZh: AI 增強的 Uniswap 介面，最佳路由、流動性分析、交換執行。

name: CoinAnk API
description: Deep market analytics — funding rates, open interest, liquidation data, and derivatives insights.
descriptionZh: 深度市場分析 — 資金費率、未平倉量、清算數據、衍生品洞察。

name: Dune
description: Query and visualize on-chain data with Dune Analytics — custom dashboards and SQL queries.
descriptionZh: 用 Dune Analytics 查詢和視覺化鏈上數據，自訂儀表板與 SQL 查詢。

name: Nansen
description: On-chain intelligence platform — wallet labels, token flow analysis, and smart money signals.
descriptionZh: 鏈上情報平台 — 錢包標籤、代幣流向分析、Smart Money 信號。

name: GoPlus AgentGuard
description: Security scanner for tokens and contracts — detect rugs, honeypots, and malicious code.
descriptionZh: 代幣與合約安全掃描，偵測 Rug Pull、蜜罐、惡意程式碼。

name: SlowMist
description: Blockchain security intelligence — threat monitoring, vulnerability alerts, and incident tracking.
descriptionZh: 區塊鏈安全情報 — 威脅監控、漏洞警報、事件追蹤。

name: Skill Vetter
description: Audit and verify MCP Skills before installation — check permissions, dependencies, and safety.
descriptionZh: 安裝前審核 MCP Skills — 檢查權限、依賴、安全性。

name: Day1Global
description: Web3 project discovery and tracking — find early-stage projects, IDOs, and launch opportunities.
descriptionZh: Web3 專案探索與追蹤，發現早期專案、IDO 與發行機會。

name: X Research
description: Deep research tool for X (Twitter) — thread analysis, account profiling, and narrative tracking.
descriptionZh: X（Twitter）深度研究工具 — 推文串分析、帳號輪廓、敘事追蹤。
